mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_INSTANCE ( MESSAGE_SNO, TRX_ID, ORG_ID, IO_TYPE, REQ_RES_TYPE, MESSAGE_ID, TRX_TRACKING_NO, USER_ID, LOG_DTIME, LAST_LOG_DTIME, LAST_RT_CODE, INSTANCE_ID, RETRY_TRX_YN, MESSAGE_DATA, TRX_DTIME, CHANNEL_TYPE, URI, SUCCESS_YN ) VALUES ( #{messageSno}, #{trxId}, #{orgId}, #{ioType}, #{reqResType}, #{messageId}, #{trxTrackingNo}, #{userId}, #{logDtime}, #{lastLogDtime}, #{lastRtCode}, #{instanceId}, #{retryTrxYn}, #{messageData}, #{trxDtime}, #{channelType}, #{uri}, #{successYn} )
